zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Botetourt於大約1348年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維奧利 卡素時，她的父親Sir John Botetourt32歲，母親Joyce de la Zouche32歲。她於1365年與Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1420年8月12日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce Botetourt于大约1348年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維奧利 卡素时，她的父亲Sir John Botetourt32岁，母亲Joyce de la Zouche32岁。她于1365年与Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1420年8月12日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Botetourt was born about 1348, in Weoley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Botetourt, was 32 and her mother, Joyce de la Zouche, was 32. She married Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight in 1365, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 12 August 1420, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight en 1365, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 12 août 1420, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1365 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 12. ja.lifeSummary: Joyce Botetourtが約1348年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウエオリー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Botetourtは32歳，母Joyce de la Zoucheは32歳であった。1365年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでLord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1420年8月12日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드
ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Botetourt(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 베오리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Botetourt(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce de la Zouche(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Weoley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Botetourt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de la Zouche, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight em 1365, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 12 de agosto de 1420, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Botetourt родилась около 1348 г. в местности веоли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Botetourt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joyce de la Zouche, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert de Swinburne of Little Horkesley Sir Knight в 1365 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 12 августа 1420 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
